response.original_title: Federico Faggin: The Man Who Saw The Future
response.overview: Federico Faggin is one of the greatest minds of our time. Bill Gates once said, “If Faggin didn’t exist, Silicon Valley would just be a valley.” And it’s no exaggeration—Faggin invented the microchip, the touchscreen, and the touchpad, forever transforming the way we interact with technology. He founded several successful companies, yet he remains largely unknown to the general public.
response.title: Federico Faggin: The Man Who Saw The Future
